errors.networkDown: It looks like you're offline. Check your connection and try again.
errors.serverUnavailable: We're having trouble reaching the server right now. Give it a moment and try again.
errors.timeout: That took a bit longer than expected. Please try again.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
errors.generic: We couldn't get a response. Please try again.
